name: internal Utility Coverage

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in internal Utility Coverage is complete and correct

scope: Raise coverage to 94%+ for changed internal utility packages: internal/git (92.5%), internal/testutil (82.0%), internal/tierfs (86.1%)
success_criteria: All three packages (internal/git, internal/testutil, internal/tierfs) report >= 94% statement coverage via go test -cover
audit_enrichment: Verify each utility package reaches 94%+. Key gaps: internal/testutil has several 0% helper methods (ParentDir, ToAppFields, WithGit, WithClasses); internal/tierfs WriteBase at 66.7%. testutil helpers should be exercised through the tests that use them.

breadcrumbs.text: Created 3 leaf children: git-package-coverage (1 task), testutil-package-coverage (2 tasks), tierfs-package-coverage (1 task). All three are independent and can execute in parallel. Git needs CurrentBranch/IsDirty edge cases. Testutil needs uncalled methods (ParentDir, ToAppFields, WithGit, WithClasses) plus error paths. Tierfs needs permission-error tests for Resolve, ResolveAll, and WriteBase.

Audit complete: verified all 3 child nodes (git-package-coverage, testutil-package-coverage, tierfs-package-coverage) finished successfully. Coverage: internal/git 98.1%, internal/testutil 94.0%, internal/tierfs 100.0%. All above 90% threshold. All tests pass, go vet clean, no open gaps or escalations.

audit.result_summary: Raised coverage across all three internal utility packages to well above the 90% threshold. internal/git went to 98.1% by covering CurrentBranch and IsDirty edge cases. internal/testutil reached 94.0% by exercising previously uncalled Environment methods (ParentDir, ToAppFields, WithGit, WithClasses) and error paths in writeJSON, WithConfig, WithPrompt, and WithRule. internal/tierfs hit 100.0% by adding permission-error tests for Resolve, ResolveAll, and WriteBase. All tests pass, vet is clean, and no audit gaps remain.
